Agent Notes: Developer-friendly file upload library built for Next.js and TypeScript. Abstracts away S3 complexity. Good for agents that need to handle user file uploads or store generated outputs with a simple API. Paid tier at $10/month for 100 GB.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://uploadthing.com/sign-in

### Upstash Redis
URL: https://upstash.com/redis
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free tier: 256 MB data, 500K commands/month, 10 GB bandwidth/month, 10K connections, 1 database. No credit card required.
Limits: 256 MB data; 500K monthly commands; 10 GB bandwidth; 1 database; 1 concurrent connection
Agent Notes: Serverless Redis — perfect for agent rate limiting, session caching, pub/sub between agents, and storing intermediate state. Pay-per-request pricing means zero cost at idle. Works natively with Vercel Edge and Cloudflare Workers.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://console.upstash.com

### Backblaze B2
URL: https://www.backblaze.com/cloud-storage
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free tier with 10 GB storage and 1 GB/day downloads. S3-compatible object storage at 1/5 the cost of AWS S3.
Limits: 10 GB storage. 1 GB/day free downloads. 2,500 free API calls/day.
Agent Notes: S3-compatible API means agents can use standard S3 SDKs. Very affordable for storing agent artifacts, logs, and generated content.
Discount: 10 GB free storage
Eligibility: All users


## 🎨 AI Media Generation
AI-powered image generation, video creation, voice synthesis, and audio processing APIs for agents that produce rich media content.

### AssemblyAI
URL: https://www.assemblyai.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free tier: transcribe up to 185 hours of pre-recorded audio free (credit-based), or 333 hours of streaming audio free. Includes Speech-to-Text and Audio Intelligence models.
Limits: 185 hours pre-recorded OR 333 hours streaming free; up to 5 new streams per minute
Agent Notes: Strong free tier for audio transcription with additional Audio Intelligence features (topic detection, sentiment analysis, PII redaction). Good for agents that process user voice recordings, meeting transcripts, or audio files.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://www.assemblyai.com/dashboard/signup

### Cloudinary
URL: https://cloudinary.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free forever plan: 25 monthly credits (covering storage, transformations, and bandwidth), 3 users/1 account. No credit card required.
Limits: 25 monthly credits; 3 users; no time limit
Agent Notes: Full-featured image and video management with AI-powered transformations (background removal, auto-cropping, quality optimization). Agents can use it to process uploaded images, generate responsive variants, and deliver optimized media via CDN.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://cloudinary.com/users/register_free

### Deepgram
URL: https://deepgram.com
Type: startup-credits
Deal: New accounts: $200 in free credits, no credit card required, no expiration. Covers Speech-to-Text, Text-to-Speech, Voice Agent API, and Audio Intelligence. Startup Program: up to $100,000 in credits for 12 months for early-stage startups.
Limits: $200 free credits (no expiry); up to 100 concurrent REST STT calls; 45 concurrent TTS calls; startup program requires <$10M raised
Agent Notes: Best value speech-to-text API with the most generous free credits. $200 covers ~50+ hours of voice agent usage. Startup Program offers up to $100k credits for 12 months — exceptional for voice-first AI agent products.
Discount: Startup Program: up to $100,000 in credits for 12 months. Apply at deepgram.com/startup-program
Eligibility: AI builders and early-stage startups with <$10M raised, in production or launching in 6 months
Apply: https://deepgram.com/startup-program

### ElevenLabs
URL: https://elevenlabs.io
Type: startup-credits
Deal: Free tier: 10,000 credits/month (~10 min standard TTS or ~20 min Flash TTS), includes Text-to-Speech, Speech-to-Text, Sound Effects, Voice Design, and Music. Startup Grants: 12 months free + 33M characters for eligible early-stage startups (<25 employees).
Limits: 10K credits/month free (~10 min TTS); Startup Grant: 33M characters over 12 months (~680 hours of Conversational AI)
Agent Notes: Leading voice AI platform for agent-generated speech. Startup grant provides 12 months free — best offer in AI voice space. Agents can use for read-aloud responses, voice notifications, audio summaries, and full Conversational AI pipelines.
Discount: Startup Grants Program: 12 months free + 33M characters (~$500+ value). Apply at elevenlabs.io/startup-grants
Eligibility: Early-stage startups/small companies with <25 employees
Apply: https://elevenlabs.io/startup-grants

### FAL.ai
URL: https://fal.ai
Type: free-tier
Deal: Pay-as-you-go with initial free credits for new accounts. FLUX Kontext Pro at $0.04/image; Wan 2.5 video at $0.05/second; GPU compute from $0.99/hr (A100). Research Grants program available for open-source projects.
Limits: Free credits for new accounts (amount varies; Reddit reports these were removed for some users as of Dec 2025); then pure pay-as-you-go
Agent Notes: Fast GPU inference API for image, video, and audio models. Run FLUX, Wan, Stable Diffusion, and more. Fastest inference times in the industry. Research Grants provide free compute for open-source AI projects. Ideal for agents needing low-latency image generation.
Discount: Research Grants for open-source projects at fal.ai/grants
Eligibility: Anyone; Research Grants for open-source developers
Apply: https://fal.ai/dashboard

### Imgix
URL: https://www.imgix.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free 30-day trial: 100 credits, no credit card required. Access to full image rendering API, unlimited transformations, and asset manager. Paid plans from $25/month (starter: 100 credits/month).
Limits: 30-day trial; 100 credits; 1,000 origin images on free self-service tier
Agent Notes: Real-time image processing and CDN delivery via URL parameters. Agents can dynamically resize, format-convert, and optimize images on the fly without pre-processing. Credit-based pricing model now covers all features including AI and video.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://dashboard.imgix.com/sign-up

### Leonardo.ai
URL: https://leonardo.ai
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free plan: 150 fast tokens/day (resets daily). All generations are public on free plan. Paid API plans start at $9/month for 3,500 API credits (separate from UI subscription).
Limits: 150 fast tokens/day (UI); all generations public; separate API credits needed for programmatic access
Agent Notes: High-quality image generation with a wide selection of fine-tuned models. The free tier is UI-only (public generations); agents need a separate API plan starting at $9/month. Good for consistent style/character generation via custom model training.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://app.leonardo.ai/auth/sign-up

### PlayHT (PlayAI)
URL: https://play.ht
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free plan: 5,000 words/month, limited premium voices, voice cloning trial (no commercial use). Supports 600+ AI voices, 140+ languages.
Limits: 5,000 words/month free; limited voices; no commercial use on free plan
Agent Notes: Alternative to ElevenLabs with a large voice library and low-latency TTS API. Good for agents generating diverse voice characters, podcast narration, or multilingual speech output. API available on paid plans.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://play.ht/signup/

### Stability AI
URL: https://platform.stability.ai
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free tier: 25 credits on sign-up. Additional credits: $10/1,000 credits (~5,000 SDXL images). Stable Image Core: $0.03/image; Stable Diffusion 3.5: from $0.035/image.
Limits: 25 free credits on sign-up; $0.002/credit for standard models; no ongoing free tier
Agent Notes: Direct access to Stable Diffusion and Stable Image APIs. Agents can generate images, upscale, and create video frames. REST API is straightforward to integrate. Lower cost per image than DALL-E for bulk generation tasks.
Discount: 25 free credits on sign-up
Eligibility: All new accounts

### Sharp
URL: https://sharp.pixelplumbing.com
Type: open-source
Deal: Free open-source Node.js image processing library. High-performance resize, convert, and manipulate images.
Limits: Unlimited. Open-source.
Agent Notes: Fastest Node.js image processing library. Agents that handle images can resize, convert, and optimize without external API calls.
Discount: Free and open-source
Eligibility: All developers
Apply: https://github.com/lovell/sharp


## 🪵 Logging & Error Tracking
General-purpose logging, error tracking, and incident management tools that help debug agent failures and monitor system health.

### Axiom
URL: https://axiom.co
Type: free-tier
Deal: Personal (free forever): 500 GB/month data ingest, 10 GB-hrs/month query compute, 25 GB storage (30-day retention), 2 datasets, 256 fields/dataset, 1 user, 3 monitors. No credit card needed.
Limits: 500 GB/month ingest; 10 GB-hrs/month query compute; 25 GB storage; 30-day retention; 2 datasets; 1 user
Agent Notes: Purpose-built for developer observability with a focus on structured logs and traces. Excellent for ingesting AI agent telemetry, LLM call logs, and structured events at high volume. Used natively by Vercel for edge function logs.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://app.axiom.co/register

### Baselime
URL: https://baselime.io
Type: free-tier
Deal: Completely free plan: unlimited users, 7-day retention, up to 1 billion events/month, unlimited environments and alerts. Includes distributed tracing, log management, error tracking, metrics, and integrations.
Limits: 1B events/month; 7-day data retention; unlimited users/environments/alerts
Agent Notes: Serverless and edge-native observability — built for Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda, and Vercel. Excellent for monitoring distributed AI agent workflows. Moved from AWS to Cloudflare in 2024, reducing cloud costs 80%.
Discount: Entirely free — no paid tier currently
Eligibility: Anyone

### BetterStack (Logtail)
URL: https://betterstack.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free personal plan: 3 GB logs (3-day retention), 30 GB metrics, 100,000 exceptions/month, 5,000 session replays, 10 monitors + heartbeats, 1 status page, Slack + email alerts.
Limits: 3 GB logs; 3-day log retention; 100k exceptions/month; 5k session replays; 10 monitors; 1 status page
Agent Notes: Combines logging, uptime monitoring, and incident management in one platform. Heartbeat monitoring is particularly useful for validating that scheduled agents are running. 60-day money-back guarantee on paid plans.
Discount: No known public coupon; 60-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://betterstack.com/users/sign-up

### Highlight.io
URL: https://www.highlight.io
Type: open-source
Deal: Free Forever plan: $0/month, 500 monthly sessions, AI error grouping, up to 15 seats. Open-source and self-hostable. Pay-as-you-go starts at $50/month.
Limits: 500 sessions/month; up to 15 seats; AI error grouping included
Agent Notes: Open-source full-stack monitoring combining session replay, error tracking, and logging. Self-hostable for unlimited free usage. Great for monitoring agent UI interactions and backend errors in a single cohesive view.
Discount: No coupon needed; open-source self-hosting is free
Eligibility: Anyone; self-hosting has no limits
Apply: https://app.highlight.io/sign_up

### PostHog LLM Analytics
URL: https://posthog.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free forever: 100,000 LLM events/month, no credit card required, 1-year data retention. Usage-based after free tier at $0.00006/event. 25% discount for non-profits.
Limits: Free: 100k LLM events/month, 1-year retention, 1 project, unlimited team members. Usage-based after: $0.00006/event. Pay-as-you-go plan unlocks 6 projects.
Agent Notes: Adds LLM analytics to an existing full product analytics stack — track agent usage alongside user behavior, funnel analysis, session replay, and feature flags in one tool. Useful for product-focused AI companies that need to correlate agent performance with user outcomes. Not agent-framework-aware but great for product analytics of agent-powered features.
Discount: 25% off for non-profits. Startup credits program also available.
Eligibility: Non-profit organizations
Apply: https://posthog.com/pricing

### Sentry
URL: https://sentry.io
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free Developer plan: 5,000 errors/month, 5M spans (tracing), 50 session replays, 5 GB logs, 1 uptime monitor, 1 cron monitor, 1 GB attachments, 30-day retention, 10 custom dashboards.
Limits: 1 user; 5k errors/month; 5M tracing spans; 50 session replays; 5 GB logs; 1 uptime + 1 cron monitor; 30-day lookback
Agent Notes: Industry-standard error tracking for agents. Captures exceptions, traces, and performance issues across distributed agent pipelines. Cron monitoring helps track scheduled agent jobs. Free tier covers most small-to-mid agent deployments.
Discount: No known public coupon
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://sentry.io/signup/


## 🏢 Vertical Agent Platforms
Purpose-built agent platforms for specific industries — sales, customer support, recruiting, data enrichment, and more.

### Artisan (Ava AI SDR)
URL: https://www.artisan.co
Type: startup-credits
Deal: Demo/trial available. Pricing custom — fully autonomous AI SDR agent for outbound sales.
Limits: Custom enterprise pricing. Fully autonomous AI SDR: autonomous prospecting, research, email writing, sending, and follow-up. 300M+ B2B contact database bundled. Email deliverability tools. LinkedIn messaging (note: LinkedIn banned January 2026). Contact sales for pricing.
Agent Notes: Vertical AI agent purpose-built for outbound sales — Ava handles the entire SDR workflow autonomously. Representative of the 'vertical agent' trend where specialized agents replace human roles in specific workflows. Bundles data, execution, and deliverability in one agent product.
Eligibility: Enterprise sales teams

### Clay
URL: https://www.clay.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free plan available with limited credits. Starter at $149/month, Explorer at $349/month.
Limits: Free: limited credits; Starter ($149/month); Explorer ($349/month); Pro ($800/month); Enterprise: custom. Waterfall enrichment from 75+ data providers. AI research agent 'Claygent' for prospect research. Used by sales teams for signal-based outreach personalization.
Agent Notes: Data enrichment and sales automation platform with built-in AI agent (Claygent) for autonomous prospect research. Waterfall enrichment across 75+ sources maximizes data coverage. AI agent personalizes outreach at scale by researching each prospect. Category-defining tool for sales agent stacks.
Eligibility: All users
Apply: https://www.clay.com/pricing


## 📑 Document & PDF Generation
Libraries and APIs for agents to programmatically generate PDFs, spreadsheets, and formatted documents.

### @react-pdf/renderer
URL: https://react-pdf.org
Type: open-source
Deal: Free and open-source (MIT license). No pricing — install via npm and generate PDFs entirely client-side or server-side in Node.js with React components.
Limits: No limits — fully open source; runs in Node.js and browser
Agent Notes: The standard library for programmatic PDF generation in React/Node.js. Agents can generate invoices, reports, and documents using familiar React component syntax. No server costs, no API calls — pure client/server rendering.
Discount: Free and open source — no cost
Eligibility: Anyone

### Apryse (formerly PDFTron)
URL: https://apryse.com
Type: free-tier
Deal: Free trial available (full SDK access for evaluation). Production licenses start at $1,500/year. Custom enterprise pricing based on features, document volume, and deployment (client-side, server, or cloud).
Limits: Free trial for evaluation only; production requires paid license starting at $1,500/year
Agent Notes: Enterprise-grade PDF SDK for complex document workflows (annotation, form filling, conversion, redaction, digital signatures). Overkill for simple PDFs but essential for agents handling legal/financial documents requiring high-fidelity rendering and compliance.
Discount: Free trial available; contact sales for custom enterprise pricing
Eligibility: Anyone for trial; paid license for production
Apply: https://apryse.com/form/trial-download

### PDFKit
URL: https://pdfkit.org
Type: open-source
Deal: Free and open-source (MIT license). A PDF document generation library for Node.js and browser. Used as the rendering engine inside @react-pdf/renderer.
Limits: No limits — fully open source
Agent Notes: Low-level PDF generation for Node.js with full control over layout, fonts, images, and vector graphics. Useful for agents generating programmatic reports without React overhead. Used by @react-pdf/renderer under the hood.
Discount: Free and open source — no cost
Eligibility: Anyone
Apply: https://github.com/foliojs/pdfkit
